summary.intent: Migrate the release-from-fbc Jenkins job to Tekton by creating a new Pipeline on the artc2023 cluster in the art-cd namespace.
summary.outcome: Created the release-from-fbc Tekton Pipeline, added GITLAB_TOKEN to the artcd Task, and added oras CLI to the base container image. Pipeline runs but fails due to oras authentication issues accessing quay.io artifacts.

repo: The artcd Task is a shared execution environment (container + secrets + volumes) used by all Tekton Pipelines; pipeline-specific logic lives in the script parameter
The art-cd:latest container image is built from art-cluster/pipelines/data/project/art-cd/image/Containerfile.base in the art-tools repo
release-from-fbc pipeline is a leaf node with no downstream Jenkins/Tekton triggers, so no Python code changes needed for Jenkins/Tekton branching
GITLAB_TOKEN credential from Jenkins (art-bot-jenkins-gitlab) is needed for the --create-mr flag in release-from-fbc
Tekton v1 doesn't allow Pipeline-level env var injection into Tasks when using taskRef; secrets must be added to the Task itself or installed via script

code.finding: Added oras v1.3.0 installation using tar.gz extraction pattern (download, extract to temp dir, move binary to /usr/local/bin)

workflow: Using optional: true on secret-backed env vars in Tekton Tasks makes them safe for pipelines that don't need those secrets
Tools missing from container images require either on-the-fly installation in pipeline scripts or base image updates
MCP server resources_create_or_update can be used to patch Kubernetes resources like Tasks and Pipelines directly

friction: oras CLI tool was not included in the art-cd:latest container image, requiring on-the-fly installation and base image update
Tekton doesn't support per-pipeline env var injection without modifying the shared Task, creating a purity tradeoff
oras discover returns empty referrers in Tekton environment despite artifacts existing (authentication issue with quay.io registry access)
open_items: Fix oras authentication issue - the tool needs to use KONFLUX_ART_IMAGES_AUTH_FILE or equivalent registry credentials to access quay.io artifacts
Rebuild art-cd:latest container image to include oras (currently installing on-the-fly in pipeline script)
Verify release-from-fbc pipeline works end-to-end once authentication is fixed
